name: IdsCchgMultCatGrpLoad

text.value: WITH Tfrm_VrsnId AS (SELECT CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, @{pipeline().parameters.VersionId} AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.RFHV_TMP_IdsCchgMultCatGrpLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP AS T USING Tfrm_VrsnId AS S ON T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK = S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID = S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC = S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, T.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX = S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, T.VRSN_ID = S.VRSN_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, VRSN_ID) VALUES (S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_ID, S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_1_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_2_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_3_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_4_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_5_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_6_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_7_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_8_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_9_SK, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_DESC, S.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_MPPNG_TX, S.VRSN_ID);

Description:
CALLED BY: CblTalnCchgLoadSeq

PROCESSING:  Loads data into CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP table and rejected records into a Rej file. 
                                                                
     
MODIFICATIONS:

Update Term date for old records in After load SQL
Read Load File created in the FKEY job
Tfrm Version Id
Load CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP table
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file
